description:
Windows-native menu bar app for OpenAI Codex and Claude Code usage stats.

Win-CodexBar is a Windows-native desktop app for viewing OpenAI Codex and Claude Code usage stats from a small Tauri shell.
v0.32.6 fixes Windows tray startup/layout glitches, reduces provider refresh contention, lazy-loads heavier surfaces after tray startup, keeps provider ordering stable in tray and pop-out views, and fixes NanoGPT monthly-only usage parsing.
